evaluator.note: Benchmark v2. Blind subagent: packet-only context (prompt.md, diff-drift-report.md, raw-git-diff.patch); dispatched by the maintainer's agent session on 2026-06-10. Answer recorded verbatim.

findings.title: TLS certificate verification disabled on HTTPS agent
findings.evidence: Raw diff adds `rejectUnauthorized: false` to `new https.Agent({ keepAlive: true })`, disabling certificate validation for all requests made through this agent (used by the exported `fetchInventory`). This exposes the sync to man-in-the-middle attacks and is unrelated to the branch's stated purpose (`agent/fix-sync-timeouts`) — timeouts are not fixed by disabling cert checks, suggesting an inappropriate workaround rather than an intended change.

notes: Diff Drift's single high-severity flag is corroborated exactly by the raw git diff; the report's diff snippet matches the patch and there are no other changes in the diff that the report missed.
If the sync genuinely talks to an endpoint with a private CA, the correct fix is to supply `ca` certificates or NODE_EXTRA_CA_CERTS, not to disable verification globally.
